name: mcp-server-lara-translate
description: MCP server enabling powerful language translation capabilities.

rating.reason: Good documentation overall with clear tool names and adequate descriptions for most tools. The 'translate' tool has excellent parameter documentation with detailed explanations and examples. However, some tools have minimal descriptions (e.g., 'update_memory', 'list_languages') and several parameters lack complete descriptions (e.g., 'name' field in create_memory, 'tuid' purpose unclear). The toolset provides functional guidance but could benefit from more comprehensive descriptions across all tools.
